text: A colorfully painted line of bunched together houses lines a poorly paved road, featuring a fifties-style car. a donkey pulling a seated conveyance, and several people walking and standing, including a woman with the donkey's rope halter in hand.
There is a laptop with people on it giving a speech.
A young girl wearing a helmet riding a horse.
A picture of someone's 50th birthday cake  that has a toilet on top.
a motorcycle is sitting in a shop full of parts
a giraffe reaching down to itch itself on its back
A motorcycle is parked on a driveway in front of a snowy background.
A hanger on a rack in a green bathroom wall.
a close up of an elephant behind a fence
a dog is on a leash next to a bench
